title: Wolf Girl and Black Prince
sourceNotes: Single season, 12 episodes. Manga complete; AniList lists 69 chapters (16 volumes, including bonus/extra stories woven into the main numbering used by most fan guides, which top out around ch. 58). The anime adapts the early relationship through roughly the main-numbering equivalent of Chapter 21-22 (end of Volume 6); the remainder of the romance plays out manga-only.
